title: Owner Closeout Sprint Pack v5.5
previousPackage: P0 Remediation and Repeat-Run Control Package v5.4
recommendedDecision: Use v5.5 to run the private owner closeout sprint, accept or block P0 evidence placeholders, confirm quorum and stop triggers, then decide whether to run the repeat private fake/sample P0 stress lab, repeat remediation, or no-go/archive. Do not proceed to limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, or live Decidim access until every owner closeout passes and the repeat P0 run also passes privately.
sprintRule: Use v5.5 to run a private owner closeout sprint before any repeat stress lab or pilot decision; it is an execution layer, not approval to proceed.
evidenceRule: Each owner must accept or block their own private evidence placeholder, public-safe line, and repeat-run stop trigger.
decisionRule: The sprint can end only with a recorded private decision: proceed to repeat run, repeat remediation, or no-go/archive.
launchBlockRule: Limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, and live Decidim access remain blocked until the v5.5 owner closeout sprint and repeat P0 run both pass.

sourceAnchors.label: v4.8 Pilot Decision and Build Handoff Room
v4.9 Private Owner Decision Meeting Pack

v5.4 P0 Remediation Repeat-Run Control Package

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Name chair, alternate, scope, and decision authority.
ownerSprintBoard.evidenceDue: Private authority roster and minute placeholder.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Chair and alternate recorded with quorum authority.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: No named chair or unclear authority route.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Authority remains private and unresolved; no pilot has been approved.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Approve consent, notice, withdrawal, storage, and contact copy.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Copy implies real intake or unclear withdrawal.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Privacy and consent controls remain under private owner review.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Confirm outbound email stays disabled or fake/sample-contained.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: No real outbound email can send from the demo.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Any real email sends or live invite is implied.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: No outbound email is active for real participants.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Accept export, delete, retention, and custody drill proof.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Export, delete, retention, and custody pass privately.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Delete proof absent or retention unclear.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Data export, deletion, and retention controls remain under private review.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Accept complaint, pause, escalation, and closeout route.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Support owner confirms pause and escalation route.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Complaint path has no owner or no pause route.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Support routes are not live services.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Confirm official Toastmasters systems stay out of scope.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: No official member, payment, education, officer, or club workflow is active.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: First Nations Toastmasters remains a fake/sample guest and boundary tester only.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Accept custody index and redaction rules.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Public package shows only aggregate status and custody placeholders.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Private evidence is not published in the public package.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Close provider real-record refusal and fake/sample-only boundary pack.
ownerSprintBoard.evidenceDue: Provider refusal proof and RFQ boundary approval.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Provider real-record asks are rejected and redirected to fake/sample schemas only.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Provider receives or is promised real records, official records, outbound email, credentials, logs, or live access.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Guest support wording cannot read as official member service.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Copy implies member service, officer, payment, education, or official record.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: First Nations Toastmasters sample records do not represent official member services.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Attach backup restore, revoke, and credential proof references.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Security reviewer accepts fake/sample environment proof.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Credential, log, restore, or revoke proof missing.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: No live Decidim access is approved by this public demo.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Accept admin expiry, revoke route, and access owner path.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Admin access has expiry, revoke route, and owner approval.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Unrestricted or unowned admin access appears.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: No live admin access is approved by this public demo.

ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: RFQ excludes real records, official Toastmasters data, outbound email, credentials, and live access.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Provider scope implies live or real-record access.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Provider or self-build options remain under fake/sample-only review.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Complete owner alternate rota and attendance roster.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Every required owner has an alternate and attendance state.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: No quorum or missing owner alternate.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Named owners must approve their own gates privately.

ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: No real business-sensitive or contact fields appear.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation test path.

ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Public line says preparation only and does not imply launch.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Public wording implies approval, launch, or private evidence pass.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: The public demo remains a fake/sample preparation tool; no live pilot has been approved.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Add v5.5 sprint pack to reviewer materials.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Reviewers can follow agenda, evidence, closeout, and decision paths.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Reviewer pack lacks closeout sprint steps.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: The demo now includes an owner closeout sprint layer.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Prepare final decision minute shell and outcome options.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Proceed, repeat, and no-go/archive options are explicit.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Decision minute implies proceed before closeout.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: The next valid step is closeout sprint, repeat testing, or no-go/archive.

ownerSprintBoard.sprintAction: Schedule repeat P0 lab only after owner closeout is accepted.
ownerSprintBoard.evidenceDue: Private calendar hold and stop trigger register.
ownerSprintBoard.closeoutCriteria: Calendar, quorum, evidence folder, and stop triggers are confirmed.
ownerSprintBoard.stopTrigger: Repeat run starts before P0 closeout readiness.
ownerSprintBoard.publicLine: Preparation continues; no pilot has been approved.

providerCloseouts.refusalLine: We cannot provide real participant records for this fake/sample review.
Official Toastmasters records are out of scope.
providerCloseouts.stopTrigger: Provider asks for official member list

providerCloseouts.refusalLine: Outbound email is not active for real people.
providerCloseouts.safeAlternative: Use local fake invite preview only.
providerCloseouts.stopTrigger: Any real email send is attempted

providerCloseouts.refusalLine: Admin credentials cannot be shared outside the approved channel.
providerCloseouts.safeAlternative: Use least-privilege temporary account after owner approval.

providerCloseouts.refusalLine: Private logs or evidence cannot be transferred.
External retention needs deletion and retention proof.
providerCloseouts.safeAlternative: Use temporary synthetic export with deletion proof.

providerCloseouts.refusalLine: Restore proof must be demonstrated privately.
providerCloseouts.stopTrigger: Backup is assumed but not proven

providerCloseouts.refusalLine: Public wording must say preparation, not launch.

publicStatusLines.approvedLine: The public demo now includes an owner closeout sprint pack; no live pilot has been approved.
publicStatusLines.blockedLine: The project is ready for pilot.

publicStatusLines.approvedLine: P0 owner closeout remains private and must pass before repeat testing.
The next valid operating step is repeat private fake/sample stress testing after owner closeout.
Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation pathway.
First Nations Toastmasters remains a fake guest/member-boundary sample only.
publicStatusLines.blockedLine: Official Toastmasters members are being onboarded.

publicStatusLines.approvedLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.
publicStatusLines.blockedLine: A provider is reviewing real data.

publicStatusLines.approvedLine: Private evidence remains outside the public package.
Privacy and consent controls remain under private owner review.
Official Toastmasters workflows are not active or approved in this demo.
publicStatusLines.blockedLine: Official Toastmasters processes are being tested live.

publicStatusLines.approvedLine: No-go/archive remains explicit if P0 closeout does not pass.

finalMinuteItems.mustRecord: Accept, hold, repeat, or no-go for each P0
Consent, withdrawal, storage, contact, outbound-email state
Official Toastmasters boundary accepted or no-go retained
Real-record refusal and fake/sample RFQ boundary
Barayamal and First Nations Toastmasters sample outcomes
Proceed to repeat run, repeat remediation, or no-go/archive
Private custody placeholder and public-safe summary
